roles.title: UX Designer
bullets: Designed and refined wireframes and interactive prototypes to support the development of user-centred digital solutions through Figma design systems
Conducted and documented user testing sessions, including note-taking and synthesizing feedback to inform design improvements
Collaborated as an active project team member, contributing ideas, design deliverables, and support across multiple projects
Supported compliance with AODA accessibility standards, ensuring designs were inclusive and usable for diverse users

roles.title: Data Labeler
bullets: Identified raw data to teach machine learning models how to recognise key information
Engaged in collaborative efforts with diverse teams on multiple projects, contributing to the success of our own team
Completed documentation to display information alongside the labelled data

roles.title: Gate Attendant / Administration Assistant
bullets: Delivered excellent customer service by welcoming visitors, issuing permits, addressing inquiries, and managing calls to ensure smooth operations
Oversaw financial processes including cash flow, scheduling, and preparation of expense claims
Collaborated with senior clerks to investigate discrepancies, revenue, and daily reports while maintaining accurate records, and supported onboarding for efficient team integration
